summary: Completed testing of unified notification system (Iteration 17). The notification system has been successfully adapted to include both vulnerabilities and hallazgos de auditoría. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: updated texts correctly reflect the unified GRC approach.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/config/notificaciones returns correct structure with all expected fields
Backend: PUT /api/config/notificaciones updates config successfully and persists changes
Backend: POST /api/notificaciones/ejecutar fails when notifications disabled (expected behavior)
Backend: POST /api/notificaciones/resumen-semanal fails when notifications disabled (expected behavior)
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria returns paginated hallazgos (184 total)
Backend: Hallazgos have required fields for notifications (codigo, brecha, riesgo_inherente, estado)
Backend: Vulnerabilidades have required fields for notifications
Backend: GET /api/config/responsables returns responsables list for notification recipients
UI: Header mentions 'vulnerabilidades y hallazgos de auditoría'
UI: 'Enviar también a responsables' includes 'o hallazgo de auditoría' in description
UI: 'Resumen semanal' includes 'remediaciones (vulnerabilidades y hallazgos)' in description
UI: All notification config UI elements present (switches, inputs, buttons)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested the unified notification system that now includes both vulnerabilities and hallazgos de auditoría. Key findings: (1) Notifications are currently disabled (habilitado: false) so actual email sending cannot be tested. (2) SMTP is configured with test@example.com but not functional. (3) The UI correctly shows updated texts: header mentions 'vulnerabilidades y hallazgos de auditoría', 'Enviar a responsables' mentions 'o hallazgo de auditoría', and 'Resumen semanal' mentions 'remediaciones (vulnerabilidades y hallazgos)'. (4) Backend endpoints ejecutar_notificaciones and resumen_semanal now query both collections. (5) generate_alert_email and generate_weekly_summary_email functions accept both vulnerabilities and hallazgos lists.

backend_changes: ejecutar_notificaciones queries both vulnerabilidades and hallazgos_auditoria collections
resumen_semanal combines stats from both collections
generate_alert_email accepts vulnerabilities and hallazgos lists
generate_weekly_summary_email combines stats from both collections
send-test-email includes hallazgo example in test data
frontend_changes: Header: 'Configura alertas automáticas para fechas de compromiso de vulnerabilidades y hallazgos de auditoría'
Enviar a responsables: 'Además de administradores, enviar al responsable de cada vulnerabilidad o hallazgo de auditoría'
Resumen semanal: 'Enviar resumen los lunes con todas las remediaciones (vulnerabilidades y hallazgos) próximas a vencer'
